* ERROR *
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elizabeth McDonald for petitioner Catherine Banchieri, who was also present (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Amended Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee.

The Court confirmed petitioner's understanding that the trust would remain court-supervised and that she was subject to the same terms and conditions as a conservator of the estate, and further confirmed that petitioner was bondable in the amount required.

Following discussion, the Court authorized counsel to prepare the deceased trustee Louis Samaris's final account by converting interim account #10 to a final account covering January 2023 through the date of death in July 2025, with a request to exonerate the deceased trustee's bond, and permitted verification on information and belief. The Court directed that a petition for settlement of the final account be filed by the status hearing set for April 7, 2026.

The Court took the petition for appointment of successor trustee under submission with the intent to grant and stated that status conference dates would be added to the order.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elizabeth McDonald for Louis Samaris, Trustee (via Zoom).

The Court inquired into the status of the accounting. Ms. McDonald reported that beneficiary Albert Samaris passed away in the fall, and the trustee is finalizing expenses and awaiting completion of tax returns before submitting the final accounting and distribution. Ms. McDonald estimated the final accounting could be filed within 45-60 days, pending the tax preparer's timeline.

The court continued the matter to July 15, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting , Report, Fees
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth McDonald appeared by zoom for Louis Samaris (trustee).

Mrs. McDonald stated that she filed two supplemental declarations addressing the issue of the bond and the issue of the fees paid to the paralegal. Mrs. McDonald also stated that the paralegal has been preparing the accounting schedules for this trust for some time now, that the paralegal does not work for the trustee, that this is a three-year accounting and that it is complicate as the trustee moved the trust account around five times. The court advised Mrs. McDonald that her client will need to keep track of his time if the paralegal will continue to be paid in the future and noted that the guideline fees generally include the duty to prepare the accounting. The Petition for Approval of the Ninth Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting , Report, Fees

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Ninth Account
Off Calendar Jun-04-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #8, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elizabeth McDonald appeared by zoom for trustee.

The court asked whether the fair market of the trust has increased since 2019. Mrs. McDonald stated that it has fluctuated, and that she does not know because the trustee has only given her the bank statements through 2021. Mrs. McDonald also stated that she is trying very desperately to get this accounting up to date, that she is struggling with how to get the bond consistent with the end of the accounting period and that the last time she was dealing with this no one told her about this. In addition, Mrs. McDonald stated that she just got approval to increase the bond, that she thinks she can get the 9th account filed within 30-days and asked the court to approve the 8th account. The Petition for Approval of the Eighth Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission. Status of the ninth account is set for June 4, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The trustee is ordered to be present on June 4th.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
